title: Conquestslop
description: A Conquest Reforged-based modpack with QOL improvements, visual tweaks, and tech additions.
body:
## What is Conquestslop?

The **Conquestslop** mod pack is a collaborative effort between myself (GDFauxtrot) and others to create a collection of (mostly) fitting additions to the popular [Conquest Reforged](https://modrinth.com/modpack/conquest-reforged-modpack) mod pack, for Fabric.

Currently, **Conquestslop** is based on **Conquest Reforged v1.3.5** for **Minecraft 1.20.1**.

The mod pack began as a few simple requests, quality-of-life improvements, and gameplay tweaks on top of CR. If you are already familiar with the many, many aesthetic blocks added by the existing modpack, then **Conquestslop** may provide an additional layer of gameplay to supplement your beautiful creations!

## What does Conquestslop add onto Conquest Reforged?

As a supplement to **Conquest Reforged**, this modpack aims to improve your experience with:

- **Create**: A technology mod for Minecraft based largely on physical, visual interactions between components, complimenting CR with boundless functionality
- **Immersive Aircraft**: Usher in the golden age of flight, soaring over your medieval-style creations
- **Xaero's Minimap**: A popular navigation tool for Minecraft players
- **Traveler's Backpack**: Stash and carry all of your aesthetic blocks anywhere you go
- **Crawl**: Navigate crevices and tight spaces with relative ease
- Plenty of QOL improvements:
  - **Miner's Compass** + **Compass3D**
  - **Sound Controller** (to fix some SFX that have their volume levels bugged)
  - **Double Doors**
  - **Falling Leaves**
- Some visual additions:
  - **Visuality particles**
  - **Chat Animation**
  - **Enchantment Descriptions**
  - **Particle Rain**
- And more!
